examples: I do not want to be mean to anybody but his nosiness is really exasperating.
"Hello," I said. "If you don't mind my nosiness, I'd love to know what you're doing with these turtles."
I'm sorry for nosiness, but real care you and your affection. anyway, expecting your good behaviour at Rome champion.
Asked about how his palm print had come to be found in the bank, he said he had gone to take a look at the damage after the mob had dispersed out of a "mixture of stupidity and nosiness".
